title: Bob's Bakery
description: Adds a bakery structure with Bob the Trader, offering unique trades
body:
This mod adds a small bakery to your world. Inside, you'll find Bob the villager, who sells unique baking-related items.

The bakery is fully decorated and contain some hidden loot to discover.

You can find the structure in all types of forest biomes, snow biomes, and plains biomes.

![The bakery](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8232514414a927ebff5eeeedc61b902a071ec89f.jpeg)
feel free to put it in your modpack!
